default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, workflow, and upcoming priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance Tracking Live:** The Looker Studio dashboard is active, pulling GA4/GSC data to track blog performance. LLM citations are also being monitored via Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**"Attack Resilience" Prioritized:** This Q1 campaign will be the primary focus for the next \~3 weeks, with 3–5 articles per week to complete the cluster by the end of January.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline Needs Refill:** The "Approve to Start" queue is low (20 articles). N-able must move topics from "Considering" to maintain a 2-month content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [**CTA Banners Proposed:** N-able requested more prominent, designed CTA banners to improve conversion. GrowthX will check if this is in scope.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Workflow

  - [**Published:** 3 articles are live, enabling performance tracking to begin.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Ready for Publish:** 1 article is ready to go live today.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [**In Revisions:** 1 article is with GrowthX for revisions.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [**In Editorial Review:** 2 articles are with N-able for review.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [**In PMM Review:** A healthy batch of articles is with Product Marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
      - [**Note:** Cove PMMs are reviewing quickly; Security and UEM PMMs are slower.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [**Cover Image Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
      - [**Issue:** Elaine's current process for saving images from Airtable via Google Keep is inefficient.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
      - [**Solution:** GrowthX will save cover images directly to the shared Drive for easier access.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)

### Performance Tracking & Reporting

  - [**Looker Studio Dashboard:**](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [Pulls data from GA4 and GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
      - [Filters to isolate GrowthX content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
      - [Enables cohort analysis by content cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [Reporting cadence: Bi-weekly checks, monthly deep dives.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [**LLM Citation Tracking (Scrunch):**](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
      - [Monitors N-able's citation presence in LLM responses (e.g., Perplexity, Google AI, GPT).](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
      - [Goal: Increase citation rate from the current 26% competitive presence.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Andrew's Question:** Does Scrunch use API or scraping? This matters because API data can differ from public-facing results.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Future Tool (Check That AI):**](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [GrowthX is building an in-house tool to replace Scrunch by late Feb.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [**Andrew's Request:** Details on its data collection method (API vs. scraping) to inform N-able's own tracking strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)

### Q1 Content Strategy

  - [**"Attack Resilience" Cluster:**](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
      - [**Context:** A key Q1 campaign for N-able.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
      - [**Cadence:** 3–5 articles per week, completing the cluster by the end of January.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
      - [**Product Focus:** Will be determined by PMMs during the review process.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [**Future Content Roadmap:**](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
      - [**Need:** Refill the "Approve to Start" queue to maintain a 2-month pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
      - [**Action:** N-able to select topics from the "Considering" list (32 items) and move them to "Approve to Start."](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [**Deadline:** End of January.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)

### CTA Banners

  - [**Proposal (Nick):** Replace simple text links with prominent, designed CTA banners to improve conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [**GrowthX Response:** Agrees this is more effective. Will check if banner design is in scope.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [**N-able Context:** Existing internal tools for banners are limited and product-specific.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Elaine:** Publish the ready article today.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)

      - [Provide details on Check That AI's data collection method.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
      - [Check if CTA banner design is in scope and report back.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [**N-able:**](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
      - [Move topics from "Considering" to "Approve to Start" by end of January.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
      - [Provide new content clusters for prioritization as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/xRvb3qh2n5FYAoY8cXgwD8BTbYcix-Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
